title: Zoonoses Bulletin - Canada.ca
content:
The Zoonoses Bulletin is an email subscription list that provide you with regular updates from the Public Health Agency of Canada regarding  our work on zoonoses. Zoonoses are infectious diseases that can be spread between animals and people, including those that can be spread through the bite of a tick or mosquito.
Subscribing to the Zoonoses Bulletin will help keep you up to date and informed about our work on these diseases.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, enter your e-mail address in the box below and click "Unsubscribe".
